message:
✨ Self-update button with version check (#169)

Add a self-update feature to the copilot-remote UI:

Server-side:
- GET /api/update/check: fetches origin/main and compares commits
- POST /api/update/apply: pulls, installs, rebuilds, and restarts

Web UI:
- UpdateButton component in the top toolbar with periodic checks
- Shows badge when update available with commit info
- Blocks update if uncommitted changes exist
- Graceful restart via process.exit(0) (relies on start.sh loop)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
